title: centrosema macranthum
intro: Centrosema macranthum, also known as wild cowpea or butterfly pea, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is also valued for its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centrosema macranthum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
